items.author: @togethercompute
items.text: To evaluate frontier AI agents, we need more complex tasks. But such tasks are also more prone to have design mistakes. We audited 168 LLM/agent benchmarks—eg SWE-bench, Terminal-Bench 2—and found substantial issues in many tasks... We also release an open source framework to systematically audit benchmarks.
items.title: To evaluate frontier AI agents, we need more complex tasks. But such tasks are also more prone to ha…
items.whyItMatters: Together 团队开源框架审计 168 个 agent benchmark，发现大量设计缺陷。
items.summary: To evaluate frontier AI agents, we need more complex tasks. But such tasks are also more prone to have design mistakes. We audited 168 LLM/agent benchmarks—eg SWE-bench, Terminal-Bench 2—and found substantial issues in many tasks... We also release an open source framework to systematically audit benchmarks.

items.text: Code as Agent Harness: A survey work from UIUC, Stanford, and Meta. Code is no longer just the output of AI. It is becoming the executable, inspectable, and stateful substrate through which AI agents reason, act, verify, remember, and self-correct over long horizons.

roundup.title: Claude Opus 4.8 Tops DeepSWE at 58%
roundup.subtitle: Claude Opus 4.8 发布，DeepSWE 58% Pass@1 登顶；Grok 视频模型新王
headline: @claudeai 正式发布 Claude Opus 4.8，@omarsar0 指出其在 DeepSWE Bench 取得 58% Pass@1，位列 GPT-5.5 之后第二。@reach_vb 补充 GPT-5.5 以 70% Pass@1 领先，同时在速度、成本和输出 token 上大幅优化。
@ArtificialAnlys 报告 Opus 4.8 在 Humanity's Last Exam 上领先 1 分，科学与学术推理能力显著提升。@cursor_ai 确认 Opus 4.8 已集成进 Cursor，CursorBench 上效率与持久性均优于 4.7 版本。
@arena 公布 Grok-Imagine-Video-1.5-Preview（720p）登顶 Image-to-Video Arena，较前代提升 52 分，超越 Seedance-2.0 与 HappyHorse。@runwayml 同步将 Seedance 2.0 等模型接入 API。
@Teknium 预告 Hermes Agent 下周将有重大更新，@hwchase17 则发布 Deep Agents v0.6，支持 Kimi 与 Qwen 实现 20x+ 降本。

deepDives.title: Claude Opus 4.8 发布与 DeepSWE 基准表现
deepDives.summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，在编码与科学推理基准上取得新高，多平台同步上线。

facts.text: Opus 4.8 在 DeepSWE Bench 取得 58% Pass@1，位列第二。
facts.quote: Claude Opus 4.8 has landed on DeepSWE Bench, posting a 58% Pass@1 and taking #2 overall behind GPT-5.5.

facts.text: GPT-5.5 以 70% Pass@1 领先，速度提升约 2 倍、成本减半、输出 token 仅为 1/3。
facts.quote: GPT-5.5 is #1 on DeepSWE, a hard long-horizon coding benchmark 🔥 70% pass@1 vs 58% for Claude Opus 4.8. ~2x faster, ~1/2 cost, ~1/3 output tokens.

facts.text: Opus 4.8 在 Humanity's Last Exam 上领先 1 分。
facts.quote: Claude Opus 4.8 leads Humanity's Last Exam by 1 point in a tight contest between Anthropic, Google DeepMind, and OpenAI.

bullish.text: Opus 4.8 在 CursorBench 上效率更高、更持久
Fast mode 价格大幅降低，改变交互式 coding 工作流

bullets.text: Cursor 上线 Auto-review mode，减少 Agent 工具调用审批提示
Deep Agents v0.6 支持 Kimi 与 Qwen 实现 20x+ 降本
bullets.quote: Deep Agents v0.6 makes harness profiles a first-class abstraction. Now, you can get production-grade performance from models like @Kimi_Moonshot, @Alibaba_Qwen at 20x+ lower cost.

bullets.text: 4 月使用开源权重模型的 AI 团队比例升至 1/3，9 个月前为 1/5
bullets.quote: 1 in 3 AI teams ran an open-weights model in April 2026, up from 1 in 5 nine months ago. The overall number of teams using open weights grew 3x

bullets.text: Grok-Imagine-Video-1.5-Preview（720p）在 Image-to-Video Arena 登顶，提升 52 分
bullets.quote: Grok-Imagine-Video-1.5-Preview (720p) has landed #1 in the Image-to-Video Arena! This is a massive +52 pt improvement

topTweets.author: @cursor_ai
topTweets.text: Opus 4.8 已在 Cursor 可用，效率与持久性提升
topTweets.whyItMatters: 主流 coding 工具集成新模型

takeaways: DeepSWE 等长时序编码基准已成为模型性价比核心评判标准，关注速度与 token 消耗。
Claude Opus 4.8 的 mid-conversation system prompt 更新不失效缓存，可显著降低生产成本。
开源模型采用率 9 个月内翻倍，Agent harness 与托管 evals 平台正成为 infra 重点。
视频与语音 Agent 模型持续迭代，Arena  leaderboard 与生产环境准确率需并重。
